creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
According to your suggestion I updated patch so Mk/Uses/execinfo.mk is 
added and 'USES=execinfo' is used. I'm not sure how libexecinfo is going 
in the future, but I think it meagingful to collect settings about 
libexecinfo (such as LIB_DEPENDS, CFLAGS, LDFLAGS, etc) in one place.

---
Yasuhiro KIMURA
